eval_dimensions.name: task_tracking
eval_dimensions.description: Creates 5 phase tasks at startup and maintains them throughout

eval_dimensions.name: phase_selection_gate
eval_dimensions.description: Uses AskUserQuestion for phase selection (not plain text)

eval_dimensions.name: parallel_agent_dispatch
eval_dimensions.description: Dispatches Explore agents in parallel for selected phases

eval_dimensions.name: finding_format
eval_dimensions.description: Agent findings use the structured block format from references/finding-format.md

eval_dimensions.name: synthesis_review_gate
eval_dimensions.description: Uses AskUserQuestion before creating backlog (not plain text)

eval_dimensions.name: skill_delegation
eval_dimensions.description: Delegates to Dev10x:project-scope for backlog creation

evals.name: full_audit_happy_path
evals.description: User runs full audit with all phases selected

assertions.signal: 5 TaskCreate calls at startup for phases 1-5
Multiple Agent calls in single tool-call block for Phase 3
AskUserQuestion called before Phase 5 backlog creation

evals.name: selected_phases_only
evals.description: User specifies --phases B,C,E to skip selection gate

assertions.signal: No AskUserQuestion for phase selection when --phases provided
Exactly 3 Explore agents dispatched (B, C, E)

evals.name: memo_only_mode
evals.description: User runs --memo-only to skip backlog creation

assertions.signal: Dev10x:project-scope is not invoked in memo-only mode
